title: Forged proof accepted
preconditions: weak or broken proof system or verifier
preventive_detective_corrective_controls: CTL-AGL; independent implementation tests; parameter integrity

title: Cross-domain transcript substitution
preconditions: missing domain separation or profile binding

title: Prover side-channel leakage
attack_path: observe timing, memory, power or logs

title: Transferred key treated as human continuity
preconditions: key control conflated with person presence
preventive_detective_corrective_controls: CTL-TRN; separate liveness and holder claims; recovery controls

title: False biometric determination attested
preconditions: poor capture, spoofing or model limits
attack_path: issue valid attestation for wrong determination

title: Cross-issuer duplicate enrolment
preventive_detective_corrective_controls: CTL-GOV; narrow claims; issuer coordination policy

title: Stable enrolment root enables population correlation
preconditions: stable root or member reference exposed

title: Issuer identity inferred despite concealment
preconditions: rare schema, proof or assurance combination
alongside_information: schema version, assurance class, proof size

title: Registry or status lookup reveals subject activity
Issuer-verifier collusion crosses context boundary
preconditions: context claim excludes or under-models issuer data
attack_path: join issuer records with verifier observations
deployment_decision: accept only if disclosed or mitigate

title: Rare predicate bundle fingerprints subject
attack_path: identify or classify subject from bundle
residual_risk: business need may require rare claims

title: Individually safe proofs leak jointly
preconditions: proofs share hidden relation or metadata

title: Presentation timing and frequency reveal behaviour
attack_path: infer activity from proof requests and step-ups

title: Error and retry behaviour becomes oracle
preconditions: distinct errors or timing expose state
preventive_detective_corrective_controls: CTL-OBS; uniform external errors; bounded retries

title: Policy version substitution
attack_path: present old or weak policy as current

title: Revoked or suspended state accepted
attack_path: use stale status to accept presentation

title: Assurance class inflation
attack_path: issue high class for low process

title: Agent key control mistaken for delegated authority
preventive_detective_corrective_controls: CTL-GOV; separate delegation object; scope checks

title: Algorithm downgrade during negotiation
preventive_detective_corrective_controls: CTL-AGL; signed policy and downgrade prevention

title: Enrolment root outlives defensible protection
attack_path: retain root through algorithm or governance change

title: Recovery resets reuse protections
preconditions: new secret not linked to prior state

title: Silent fallback lowers assurance or increases disclosure
attack_path: switch to weaker or more revealing path

title: Offline verification uses stale governance state
attack_path: accept with stale accreditation or status

title: Context boundary is unintelligible to affected person
Accessibility path creates disproportionate disclosure
preconditions: accessible path depends on human mediation
attack_path: collect extra identity or biometric data

title: Decision cannot be contested or corrected
attack_path: deny review or fail to propagate correction
alongside_information: decision receipt, policy and status versions
verification_method: redress tabletop and correction propagation test

title: Context silently expands through organizational change
preconditions: context change lacks notice and versioning
attack_path: merge contexts or share historical nullifiers
